summary: Games page to Upgrade Plan to Games page - Free User
description: GIVEN a Free user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Upgrade Plan" tab in the navigation header
AND selects one of the subscription package tiles on the Subscriptions page
AND presses the "back" button on the remote controller twice
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Games page
AND focus is assigned to the top left (1st) game tile
